type.en: Reason the facility does not meet the criteria for NPRI
type.fr: La raison pour laquelle cette installation ne rencontre pas les critères de déclaration de l'INRP

comments.comment:
1) Total employee hours less than 20,000 in 2022
2) Part 4 CACs from stationary combustion sources did not exceed NPRI Part 4 reporting threshold

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Had 2 flares onsite, and one flare discontinued in April 2015. A new flare was commissioned in November 2015.  A decrease in the total methane and landfill gas combusted in the flares in 2015 caused a decrease in PM2.5 releases.
